current_life_events: A childhood friend made a teasing comment about my ears sticking out, and since then I've been staring at myself in mirrors and feeling self-conscious. I have a big marketing presentation tomorrow and a networking lunch with a potential client, both of which feel high-pressure social situations.
mental_state: I feel on edge and doubting my appearance, especially when I think people are judging me.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The friend's comment sparked a new fixation on my ears, and the looming presentation and lunch make the social anxiety and body image worries feel urgent and hard to manage, prompting me to seek support today.
